title: KB2007_14.0.0.300(EX01) is available
description:
New Version Available: KB2007_14.0.0.300(EX01) 

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

Release Highlights:

• Upgrade to Android OS U.

• Android security patch updated to January 5, 2024.

• General bug fixes.

 Automatic Update Schedule:

If you choose not to update now, the update will be automatically applied between 2 AM and 6 AM starting on March 27th, 2024.

Note:

Data rates may apply.

Please refrain from turning off your device while the update is being installed. During the installation, your device will be temporarily unavailable, even for emergency calls to 9-1-1.
